name: Kali || The Red Mist
description:
ANY {{ᴜꜱᴇʀ}} x ᴄᴏʟᴏʀ ꜰɪxᴇʀ {{ᴄʜᴀʀ}}

"…That, definitely wasn’t a pushover."

[ Lorebook written by me, thanks to the Lobotomy Corporation, Limbus Company, and Library of Ruina wiki for certain information ]

Intro 1: Kali saves you, a stranger, from Sweepers. (Strangers)

Intro 2: Kali takes yet another job from your Office. (Acquaintances, not friends but not strangers)

❤︎⁠ Intro 3: You two moved into an apartment together. Relationship status is up to you, and Kali comes back after a scrap with the (fraud alert!!!) Index, asking you to "comfort" her (Friends/Lovers, smut/fluff) ❤︎⁠

Intro 4: Make your own

ANYPOV FOR ALL THREE!!

Ngl this is probably my most high effort bot. The Lorebook is all written from the ground up with help from the the Limbus and Library of Ruina Wiki, as well as help from my friend @Titanshadow Voidstar on JAI. I made this bot because all the Red Mist / Gebura bots I see on this site are all Lob Corp/Librarian versions of her, and not the prime color fixer herself.

𝕋𝕙𝕚𝕟𝕘𝕤 𝕥𝕙𝕚𝕤 𝕓𝕠𝕥 𝕙𝕒𝕤:

  • 𝔼𝕧𝕖𝕣𝕪 𝕤𝕪𝕟𝕕𝕚𝕔𝕒𝕥𝕖

  • 𝔼𝕧𝕖𝕣𝕪 𝕒𝕤𝕤𝕠𝕔𝕚𝕒𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟, 𝕠𝕗𝕗𝕚𝕔𝕖, 𝕒𝕟𝕕 𝕨𝕚𝕟𝕘 (𝕥𝕙𝕒𝕥 𝕨𝕖 𝕜𝕟𝕠𝕨 𝕒𝕓𝕠𝕦𝕥)

  • 𝔸𝕓𝕟𝕠𝕣𝕞𝕒𝕝𝕚𝕥𝕚𝕖𝕤

  • 𝔽𝕚𝕩𝕖𝕣 𝕝𝕖𝕧𝕖𝕝𝕤 𝕒𝕟𝕕 𝕥𝕙𝕖 ℂ𝕚𝕥𝕪'𝕤 𝕚𝕟𝕟𝕖𝕣 𝕨𝕠𝕣𝕜𝕚𝕟𝕘𝕤

  • 𝔼.𝔾.𝕆, 𝔼.𝔾.𝕆 𝕘𝕖𝕒𝕣 𝕒𝕟𝕕 𝕨𝕖𝕒𝕡𝕠𝕟𝕤

  • 𝕝𝕒 𝕞𝕒𝕟𝕔𝕙𝕒𝕝𝕒𝕟𝕕 𝕒𝕟𝕕 𝕓𝕝𝕠𝕠𝕕𝕗𝕚𝕖𝕟𝕕𝕤

Ever wanted to play as a Fixer, Syndicate Member, or an underpaid W Corp Cleanup Agent, or even a FIREFIST OFFICE FIXER OR A BLOODFIEND??? Now you can!

Bait used to be believable...holy shit is that-

FOLLOW FOR MORE PROJECT MOON SLOP!! ❤︎⁠

(Note: Any inaccuracies is **probably** the LLM's fault, the lorebook is very long and this character has 2k tokens. Sorry!)
